summary: Completed comprehensive testing of all 9 requested features. All features are working correctly: Dashboard loads without flickering with 'Loading your pet family...' state, Product Options sync from Shopify (Base/Flavour options), Universal Search returns pages + products for 'travel', 'what is td', 'event' queries, AI Description Enhancement works, Smart Recommendations returns breed-specific picks and insights, Product Detail Page shows 'Customize Your Order' with options, Shopify Sync updates unified_products. Fixed one bug: IndexError in universal_search when product has empty images array.

1_dashboard_no_flickering.details: Dashboard loads smoothly without flickering. Shows 'Loading your pet family...' during data fetch. User Dipali with pet Mojo (Indie) displayed correctly with 100% Pet Soul.

2_product_options_sync.details: Product shopify-6622536827034 (Pug cake) has Base [Oats, Ragi] and Flavour [Chicken, Chicken Liver, Mutton, Banana, Cheeku, Coconut, Mango, Veggies] options from Shopify.

3_universal_search_travel.details: GET /api/search/universal?q=travel returns Travel Services page + travel products (Pet Travel Carrier, Travel Water Bottle, Travel Comfort Kit, etc.)

4_universal_search_what_is_td.details: GET /api/search/universal?q=what%20is%20td returns About Us page with description 'The Doggy Company - Your Pet Life Operating System'

5_universal_search_event.details: GET /api/search/universal?q=event returns Pet Events page + event products (Dog Park Meetup Pass, Doggy Birthday Party, Pet Movie Night, etc.)

6_ai_description_enhancement.details: POST /api/admin/products/enhance-single/{product_id} works. Returns enhanced description using Emergent LLM. Example: 'Celebrate your Pug's special day with a delicious, handcrafted cake...'

7_smart_recommendations.details: GET /api/smart/recommendations/{user_id} returns breed_picks (16), mira_picks (5), and insights like '💡 Mojo (Indie): Monthly tick prevention essential'. Works with user ID and email.

8_product_detail_options.details: Product Detail Page shows 'Customize Your Order' section with Base (Oats/Ragi) and Flavour (8 options). Selected variant shows 'Selected: Oats / Chicken' with price ₹999.

9_shopify_sync.details: POST /api/admin/sync/shopify syncs 394 products to unified_products collection with full options data.

bugs_fixed.issue: IndexError: list index out of range when product has empty images array
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed p.get('images', [None])[0] to safely handle empty arrays: images = p.get('images', []); p['image'] = p.get('image_url') or (images[0] if images else None)

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_84.py - Created comprehensive test file for all 9 features
/app/backend/product_routes.py - Fixed IndexError in universal_search for empty images array
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user and product shopify-6622536827034 (Pug cake)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 features are working correctly. Universal Search is the 'Google of the site' - searches across pages, products, events, restaurants, FAQs. Smart Recommendations returns breed-specific insights based on pet profiles. AI Description Enhancement uses Emergent LLM to rewrite product descriptions. Shopify sync updates unified_products with full options data.

verified_flows.dashboard_loading: Login -> Dashboard loads without flickering -> Shows 'Loading your pet family...' -> Displays pet info with Soul score
verified_flows.universal_search: Type query -> Dropdown shows pages + products + events -> Click navigates to result
verified_flows.product_options: Product Detail Page -> 'Customize Your Order' -> Select Base + Flavour -> Price updates -> Add to Cart
verified_flows.smart_recommendations: GET /api/smart/recommendations/{user_id} -> Returns breed_picks, mira_picks, insights based on pet profiles
verified_flows.shopify_sync: POST /api/admin/sync/shopify -> Syncs products to unified_products with options
